title: Master Premier Cup
rules: No CP limit.
Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.

title: NAIC 2026 Championship Series Cup
rules: Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
Only Fairy-, Normal-, Psychic- and Water-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following types are not allowed: Dark, Grass, Steel

The following Pokemon are not allowed: Araquanid, Carbink, Chansey, Chinchou, Claydol, Clefable, Cresselia, Dedenne, Diggersby, Farfetch'd, Gastrodon, Golisopod, Greedent, Jellicent, Lanturn, Lickilicky, Lickitung, Lugia, Medicham, Oranguru, Poliwrath

title: Copa Dilúvio
rules: Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
Only Dark-, Dragon-, Steel-, and Water-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following types are not allowed: Electric, Fairy, Fighting, Fire, Ghost, Grass, Ground, Bug/Steel
Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Ultra Beasts, Mega Evolutions, and Shadow Pokémon are not eligible.
The following Pokemon are not allowed: Aegislash, Araquanid, Bastiodon, Corviknight, Doublade, Empoleon, Honedge, Klang, Mandibuzz, Obstagoon, Orthworm, Probopass, Steelix, Toxapex, Umbreon, Vullaby

title: Sin Nombre
rules: Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
Only Fairy-, Ghost-, Ice-, Normal-, and Rock-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following types are not allowed: Dark, Fire, Flying, Ground, Steel
Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Ultra Beasts, and Mega Evolutions are not eligible.
Shadow Pokémon are eligible.

The following Pokemon are not allowed: Abomasnow, Amaura, Annihilape, Aurorus, Azumarill, Bewear, Carbink, Cetoddle, Chansey, Clefable, Corsola (Galarian), Cradily, Crustle, Dolliv, Drampa, Dubwool, Dudunsparce, Dunsparce, Dusknoir, Frillish, Furfrou, Furret, Girafarig, Greedent, Jellicent, Kangaskhan, Kecleon, Lapras, Lickilicky, Lickitung, Lileep, Linoone, Miltank, Naclstack, Ninetales (Alolan), Oinkologne, Oranguru, Relicanth, Spinda, Ursaring, Vigoroth, Weezing (Galarian), Wigglytuff, Wyrdeer, Zangoose

title: Sunshine Cup
rules: Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
Only Normal-, Fire-, Grass-, and Ground-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokemon are not allowed: Charizard

title: Mega Master League
rules: No CP limit.
Mega Evolutions are eligible.

title: Elbaph Cup
rules: No CP limit.
Build a team of 6 Pokémon.
Slot 1: Choose 1 Pokémon from the permitted Slot 1 species list: Rhyperior, Tyranitar, Metagross, Groudon, Kyogre, Dialga (Origin), Palkia, Melmetal, Dialga, Ho-Oh, Lugia, Garchomp.
Slot 2: Choose 1 additional Pokémon with a Steel or Fighting typing. You may not select any Pokémon from Slot 1.
Slot 3: Choose 4 additional Pokémon with a Water, Fire, Grass, or Ground typing. You may not select any Pokémon from Slot 1 or Slot 2.
The following Pokémon are not allowed: Zygarde (Complete), Zacian (Crowned Sword), Necrozma (Dusk Mane), Solgaleo, Palkia (Origin), Landorus (Incarnate), and all Mega Evolutions.
